title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
